case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JORGE ALBERTO MENJIVAR ESCOBAR

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, JORGE ALBERTO MENJIVAR $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED MAY-20-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, JORGE ALBERTO MENJIVAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $676.74 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, JORGE ALBERTO MENJIVAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, JORGE ALBERTO MENJIVAR
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN INC.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OR OTHER CONTACT INFORMATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, JORGE ALBERTO MENJIVAR
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, JORGE ALBERTO MENJIVAR
